name: GIGABYTE X670E AORUS MASTER E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x4 M.2 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x4 M.2 - USB-C 3.2 Gen 2x2 - HDMI 2.0 - DP 1.4 - USB-C 10Gb/s with DP Alt Mode - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE X670E AORUS MASTER E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Premium AMD AM5 E-ATX motherboard with X670E chipset, dual PCIe 5.0 M.2 slots, and Wi-Fi 6E for enthusiasts.
